body.title: book_learner: Calibre books not writing completion records or updating reading_list
body.result: Per-book READING_<hash>.md report written incrementally during each run (header, chunk lines, footer). reading_list WHERE clause fixed to include 'pending'. 5 new tests. 706 total green.
body.description: Calibre books run through drain_learn_queue deposit nodes mid-run (G54 log entries confirm) but _deposit_completion_record() silently fails — no READING_<hash> node in Postgres, no reading_list status=completed. Web/URL books work. Root cause unknown: DB connection drop at end of long subprocess run, or Cortex init failing. Fix: (1) add retry + file-based fallback for completion record (write to book_learner_progress/READING_<hash>.md even if DB fails), (2) fix reading_list status update, (3) add per-book readable report file appended during run so partial runs are visible. Books that ran but have no completion record: Design Patterns (Gamma), Documenting Software Architectures, C# Vol I/II, Test Your Own Optimism, others.
